response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a diverse technical background, but lacks direct experience with C++ on Windows or fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise, which are critical for this role. Her experience with low-latency systems and scripting is a plus, but the resume does not highlight the mandatory technical or domain requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience with low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., Dunnhumby media).
Strong scripting and automation skills (Python, TypeScript, Node.js, CI/CD).
Proven ability to work in collaborative, test-driven environments (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development).
concerns: No explicit mention of C++ development on Windows or 5–10 years of C++ experience.
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
SQL experience is present but not emphasized with SQL Server/Oracle, which are mandatory.
